steps.title: Use the contrast
steps.content: The word "but" contrasts Theia's earlier status with researchers' new claim to have found pieces of it. Before the claimed physical evidence, Theia existed only as a proposed object in a theory.

steps.title: Choose the theoretical word
steps.content: Choice A means lacking order or purpose. Choice C means genuine or real, which reverses the contrast. Choice D means false, but the passage does not say the theory was fake. The remaining word means conceptual or theoretical. The answer is B.
